pages.text: The Spawnery turns glass bottles into bottled frogspawn (Frog Eggs), fueled by slime balls. Add a species primer in its slot and the eggs come out primed to that species; with no primer you get plain frogspawn.$(br2)It is a skyblock bootstrap for worlds with no swamp, and ships off by default - a pack turns it on.

The default primer for each species (a pack can change these):$(br)$(li)Cave - Iron Ingot$(li)Geode - Amethyst Shard$(li)Bog - Clay Ball$(li)Tide - Prismarine Shard$(li)Infernal - Blaze Powder$(li)Void - Ender Pearl
